subject: npmx Weekly #15
headline: npmx Weekly #15
intro: Stay ahead with the latest developments in the npmx project! Check out our key updates that enhance compatibility and modernize our packages.

topics.title: Dependency Updates
topics.summary: Recent pull requests focus on vital updates to dependencies within the npmx project, including maintenance of lock files and upgrades to packages like @e18e/eslint-plugin and @storybook-vue/nuxt to ensure optimal performance.

topics.title: ESM Transition in Packages
topics.summary: The shift of @badrap/valita to ESM-only marks a significant modernization effort for JavaScript packages, emphasizing reduced package size and enhanced performance, which is well-received by the community.
